moment.reason: In maintenance mode since 2020 (the maintainers recommend alternatives). dayjs is a ~2KB immutable library with a near-identical API.

request.reason: Deprecated in 2020 and no longer maintained. Use the built-in fetch, or got for a full-featured HTTP client.

request-promise.reason: Deprecated alongside request. got returns promises natively.

node-sass.reason: Deprecated; bindings break on new Node versions. sass is the Dart implementation (sass-embedded for speed).

tslint.reason: Deprecated in 2019 in favor of ESLint. Use typescript-eslint to lint TypeScript.

enzyme.reason: Unmaintained with no official React 17+/18 adapter. React Testing Library is the current standard.

protractor.reason: Reached end-of-life in 2023. Use Playwright (or Cypress) for browser E2E.

faker.reason: The original package was sabotaged and deprecated. @faker-js/faker is the community-maintained fork.

bower.reason: Deprecated; front-end packages ship on npm now. Use npm (or your package manager) directly.

popper.js.reason: v1 is deprecated. @popperjs/core is the maintained v2 line.

create-react-app.reason: No longer recommended by the React team and effectively unmaintained. Vite is the current scaffolding standard.

istanbul.reason: The istanbul package is legacy; nyc is its maintained CLI (or c8 for native V8 coverage).
